name: billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient compilation of billing time-sheets causes cash flow gaps. We automate time-sheet preparation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
features: export to common formats like CSV

locked_fields.primary_user: billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient compilation of billing time-sheets causes cash flow gaps. We automate time-sheet preparation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
must_have_features: export to common formats like CSV

one_liner: For billing administrators at small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient compilation of billing time-sheets causes cash flow gaps. We automate time-sheet preparation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
